title: LogRocket Session
description: Represents a LogRocket session recording containing user interactions, network requests, console logs, and errors captured during a user visit.

sessionId.description: Unique identifier for the session recording.

appId.description: The LogRocket application or project identifier.

userId.description: The identified user ID if the user was identified via LogRocket.identify().

userEmail.description: The email address of the identified user.

userName.description: The display name of the identified user.

startTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the session recording started.

endTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the session recording ended.

duration.description: Duration of the session in milliseconds.

browser.description: The browser name and version detected during the session.

deviceType.description: The type of device used during the session.

operatingSystem.description: The operating system detected during the session.

country.description: The country from which the session originated.

region.description: The region or state from which the session originated.

city.description: The city from which the session originated.

sdkVersion.description: The version of the LogRocket SDK that recorded the session.

release.description: The application release version set via LogRocket configuration.

pagesVisited.description: List of page URLs visited during the session.

errorCount.description: Number of JavaScript errors captured during the session.

traits.description: Custom user traits attached via LogRocket.identify() or the User Identification API.

NetworkRequest.description: A network request captured during the session.

url.description: The URL of the network request.

method.description: The HTTP method used for the request.

duration.description: Duration of the request in milliseconds.

ConsoleLog.description: A console log entry captured during the session.

timestamp.description: When the console log was recorded.

JavaScriptError.description: A JavaScript error captured during the session.

url.description: The page URL where the error occurred.
